sentence_reviews.text: A U-Net pairs a contracting encoder with an expanding decoder and cross-scale skip connections, preserving fine spatial detail for dense prediction or generation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Ronneberger et al. U-Net paper for contracting/expanding paths and skip connections; Deep Learning convolutional-network context.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited node/reference evidence directly supports the architecture description at this level of specificity.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Convolutional neural networks, Residual, skip & highway connections.
